description_long: This is a small, light blue bottle with a polygonal base and a cylindrical neck that flares out slightly at the top. The bottle features a prominent, hand-written style label on one side that reads 'Drink Me' in pinkish-red letters on a purple background. The body of the bottle is faceted, giving it a geometric appearance, and the neck is smooth and straight. The cap area is slightly raised but does not show a distinct removable cap. The bottle appears to be made of glass or plastic and is translucent, allowing some light to pass through. There are no visible signs of damage or wear on the surface.
description: A small, faceted light blue bottle with a 'Drink Me' label and a translucent, geometric body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's faceted body and cylindrical neck, with no label visible.
description_view_1: Rotated view reveals the edge of the 'Drink Me' label partially visible on the right side.
description_view_2: This view displays the full 'Drink Me' label prominently on the bottle's front.
description_view_3: Opposite side of the label, showing the plain faceted body and neck with no label visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: A hand-written style label reading 'Drink Me' in pinkish-red letters on a purple background, placed on the front of the bottle.
